message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 14:45
The train should leave on sunday and should depart from london liverpool street
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 2 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called rice boat
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 20:30 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
